/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ar qc libqhal.a CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/qpwr.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/qrtc.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/nrfx/qgpio.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/nrfx/qspi.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/nrfx/qtimer.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/nrfx/qrtc_share.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/nrfx/persistent_time.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/nrfx/qflash.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/qm33/qpwr.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/src/qm33/qotp.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/home/engssg/Android_DWM3000/SDK/Firmware/Src/Boards/Src/nRF52840DK/platform_l1_config.c.obj CMakeFiles/qhal.dir/home/engssg/Android_DWM3000/SDK/Firmware/Src/Boards/Src/Common/helper_platform_l1_config.c.obj
/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ranlib libqhal.a
